title: Chicken Curry
description: A flavorful and aromatic Malaysian-inspired dish featuring chicken in a rich curry sauce.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for another minute.
Add the curry powder and sauté for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the curry paste and sauté for another minute.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
Add the coconut milk, fish sauce, sugar, and chicken broth.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 15-20 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or with naan bread.
